description: ADR-032 P1-A fixture — capture_intent v1.1: intent that implies consumer-supplied source page (ask_parameterized). Phrase 'accept a Confluence page' must drive source_binding_mode=ask_parameterized and a blocking_ambiguity about source binding.

vars.intent: I need a skill that accepts a Confluence page and drafts a stakeholder status email based on the project tracking content on that page. The consumer will pass whichever project page they want to use.
